headline: SIGNAL SCAN — May 2, 2026
telegramText: SIGNAL SCAN — May 2, 2026 SNAPSHOT Risk-on momentum despite geopolitical shocks as markets compartmentalize energy disruptions while crypto rallies on institutional adoption. Regime transition signals emerging with Strait of Hormuz "100% shut down" yet BTC holding $78K and SPY up 1.3%. Cross-asset dislocation widening between energy weakness and tech strength. MACRO RISK DASHBOARD Risk Gauge: 48.1/100 (Low) Regime: OVERHEATING — inflation expectations rising amid financial conditions loosening Key prices: SPY +1.3%, QQQ +1.9%, VIX +0.6%, TLT -0.1%, DXY +0.1%, OIL -3.0% ICSA: 189K (trending down, -2.2σ below trend) FORWARD SCENARIOS SCENARIO A — Energy Shock Contagion SPY: $650-680 (-5% to -10%) BTC: $70-74K (-6% to -10%) OIL: $110-125 (+8% to +23%) SCENARIO B — Geopolitical Fade Rally SPY: $740-770 (+3% to +7%) BTC: $85-92K (+9% to +18%) OIL: $85-95 (-17% to -7%) SCENARIO C — Stagflation Transition TLT: $75-80 (-12% to -7%) GLD: $450-480 (+6% to +13%) DXY: $103-108 (+5% to +10%) SECTOR STRENGTH 1. Uranium (URA +5.6%) — bid 2. Semiconductors (SMH +2.1%) — strong 3. Utilities (XLU +1.9%) — rotating 4. Industrials (XLI +1.8%) — strong 5. Technology (XLK +1.7%) — bid BIG MOVES + DRIVERS SLV +5.3% — ETF rotation into precious metals amid geopolitical premium EWY +5.2% — South Korea becoming 8th largest stock market, ETF inflows accelerating BRENT -4.5% — Trump "war will end, oil will come tumbling down" comments SOXX +3.5% — semiconductor strength on AI infrastructure pivot narrative TKMS +3.6% — defense contractor bid on escalating military tensions Energy selling on peace premium expectations while tech/defense absorb geopolitical hedge flows — regime uncertainty driving asset rotation. POSITIONING BTC ETF flows: +$531M inflow (13th consecutive day) — institutional accumulation accelerating despite volatility Whale activity: ETH heavily shorted ($35M vs $10.8M long) while BTC balanced ($22.8M/$22.9M) — divergence suggests ETH vulnerability if crypto momentum fades IMPLICATION Tactical opportunity in energy mean reversion vs crypto momentum if geopolitical premium normalizes. Consider hedging tech exposure with utilities given late-cycle positioning and rising inflation expectations creating defensive rotation setup. agentcanary.ai | Not financial advice
